crons.description: Beat reporters run daily content sweeps. Cards ready before styling + briefing.
commands: # Each beat agent runs as an isolated session on the gateway VPS.
# The gateway iterates active beat agents and triggers each one.
# Beat reporters don't need persistent Sprites — they run and exit.
sprite exec -s mr-content -env AGENT_ID=mr-content clawdbot agent --message 'Run daily content sweep. Dispatch beat reporters for all active locations.'

crons.description: Style any unstyled cards from the overnight sweep.
commands: sprite exec -s stylist -env AGENT_ID=stylist clawdbot agent --message 'Style all unstyled cards. Budget: 50 images.'

crons.description: Trigger daily briefing creation for all active captains.
commands: # Gateway iterates all advisor-* sprites and triggers each one.
sprite exec -s advisor-bobby -env AGENT_ID=advisor-bobby-cc2a0224,USER_ID=user_bobby clawdbot agent --message 'Create today\'s briefing.'

crons.description: Advisors review and consolidate captain memories.
commands: sprite exec -s advisor-bobby -env AGENT_ID=advisor-bobby-cc2a0224 clawdbot agent --message 'Review and consolidate your memories. Archive stale observations, note gaps.'

crons.description: Mr. Content reviews card library coverage and freshness.
commands: sprite exec -s mr-content -env AGENT_ID=mr-content clawdbot agent --message 'Run weekly library health check. Report coverage gaps, stale content, category balance.'
